translated: The word "thread" is even in the lyrics of "Metamoren Ribbon."
It's a key term, and I really love these little connections.
I'm sure everyone has their own thoughts and opinions, so please use the hashtag to tweet about it. It's a very raw story, so...
I think the characters people empathize with will vary completely,
and it's only natural to have different feelings. I hope you all share those with each other.
It really was a fascinating scenario.
And with that...
Wow, I'm being so serious, aren't I?
I'm actually surprising myself.
Well, since I'm alone today and the story was what it was, I wanted to make sure I said what I needed to say.
I have moments like this too.
I often host the Wandasho Channel and things like that, so...
When I first appeared on screen alone, I bet there was a moment where everyone thought,
"Wait, is this going to be okay?"
But I do have my serious moments too.
So, thanks for sticking with me.
Thank you so much.
Well, it was only for a short while, but...
This concludes the ProSeka AfterTalk for "Beyond the Tangled Threads."
Thank you to everyone watching the stream.
I saw all the comments you were sending in.
I'm sorry I couldn't address every single one of them.
Being able to join the same room for the Live, and connecting with everyone
watching this stream in real time... it has a different kind of charm than watching alone.
That's how I feel.
How was it for all of you?
Did you have fun?
